title: derris urucu
intro: Derris urucu is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Derris urucu are attributed to its leaves, which contain rotenone, a natural insecticide and antioxidant. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Derris urucu can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
